body: PT Kian Santang Muliatama Tbk and PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk have collaborated on a gas network construction project worth IDR 29.5 billion, aiming to complete it within 2 years in Central Java and Yogyakarta. The project targets 6,700 households, covering a 60-kilometer gas network, and is part of the national medium-term plan to reach 2.5 million gas connections, with 1 million already installed.
title: PT Kian Santang and PGN Collaborate on 29.5 Billion Rupiah Gas Network Construction Project in Central Java and Yogyakarta.

body: PT Jasa Marga Tbk made a capital investment of IDR 4.39 billion in PT Bogor Serpong Infra Selaras, a joint venture managing the Bogor-Serpong via Parung toll road, acquiring 26% of the company's total issued and paid-up capital. The investment is expected to positively impact market share and potentially boost the company's stock price, which has already risen IDR 40 per share to IDR 4,900 as of this afternoon.
title: PT Jasa Marga invests in joint venture to manage Bogor-Serpong toll road, acquiring 26% stake for IDR 4.39 billion.

body: PT Betonjaya Manunggal Tbk will pay a cash dividend of IDR 7.2 billion, or IDR 10 per share, from its 2023 net profit of IDR 17.53 billion. The dividend payment is scheduled for October 10, 2024, and will be disbursed to shareholders listed as of September 23, 2024.
title: PT Betonjaya Manunggal Tbk to Distribute IDR 7.2 Billion Cash Dividend to Shareholders

body: Three new issuers - PT Avia Avian, PT Bank Cimb Niaga, and PT Cisarua Mountain Dairy - have been added to the IDX ESG Leaders index, with free float ratios ranging from 7.44% to 22.36% and ESG risk ratings between 19.13 and 21.92. Meanwhile, three companies - PT Adi Sarana Armada, PT BFI Finance Indonesia, and PT Chandra Asri Pacific - have been removed from the index, which now consists of 30 constituents from various industry sectors in Indonesia.
title: Three Indonesian companies added to IDX ESG Leaders index following September 2024 evaluation.

body: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa Tbk plans to expand its business by offering reparation services for Foton cars and trucks, with funding sourced from internal cash rollovers, following approval at an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders on September 24, 2024. As of June 2024, the company's total assets stood at USD 406.55 million, with total liabilities of USD 221.66 million and total equity of USD 184.89 million.
title: PT Hexindo Adiperkasa to expand into Foton car and truck reparation services in Indonesia.

body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia plans to divest 99.99% of its shares in PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia, a subsidiary engaged in thermal coal mining, which represents 52.9% of Adaro's total consolidated assets. The company aims to expand and diversify its non-coal business pillars, with the remaining unsold portion of AAI's shares to remain under Adaro's possession.
title: Adaro Energy to Divest 99.99% Stake in Thermal Coal Mining Subsidiary

body: PT Bank Indonesia Tbk (BBSI) has sold its assets in Bandung worth IDR 2.95 billion as part of its strategy to prioritize digital-based services, reducing the need for physical branch offices. As of June 30, 2024, BBSI reported IDR 1.41 trillion in cash and cash equivalents, with total assets of IDR 4.91 trillion and total equity of IDR 3.26 trillion.
title: Krom Bank Indonesia sells Bandung assets worth IDR 2.95 billion to shift focus to digital-based services.

body: Bank HSBC has granted BBLD a loan facility of IDR 300 billion, consisting of a revolving FI loan with a 48-month tenor and an irregular instalment loan with a 36-month tenor, to fund the company's working capital. As of March 30, 2024, BBLD had total cash and cash equivalents of IDR 476.36 billion, total assets of IDR 6.4 trillion, and total equity of IDR 1.42 trillion.
title: BBLD Secures IDR 300 Billion Loan Facility from HSBC to Fund Working Capital

body: On Tuesday, September 10, foreign investors sold a net volume of 918.65 million shares of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk, leading to a net foreign volume drop of 895.13 million shares, with other companies such as PT Bank KB Bukopin Tbk, PT Bukalapak.com Tbk, and PT Wijaya Karya Tbk also experiencing significant net sales. Meanwhile, foreign investors purchased shares of companies like PT J Resources Asia Pasifik Tbk, PT Aspirasi Hidup Indonesia Tbk, and PT Summarecon Agung Tbk, with net volumes ranging from 24.46 million to 69.77 million shares.
title: Foreign Investors Sell Shares of Indonesian Companies, Led by PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia TBK

body: Foreign investors purchased 2.46 billion shares, with a net foreign sales volume of 70.28 million shares, led by purchases of PT Goto Gojek Tokopedia Tbk, PT Maharaksa Biru Energi Tbk, and PT Intiland Development Tbk. Meanwhile, foreign investors sold 2.39 billion shares, with notable sales of PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk, PT Bukalapak.com Tbk, and PT Aneka Tambang Tbk, resulting in a net volume of -82.27 million shares.
title: Foreign investors buy 2.46 billion shares in Indonesian market, led by digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk.

body: Controlling shareholder PT Goldman Investindo Sedaya sold 400 million shares of PT Indo Boga Sukses TBK, reducing its stake from 55.79% to 50.83%, while other significant transactions included PT Triputra Investindo Arya's purchase of 101.37 million shares of PT Triputra Agro Persada TBK and PT Arthakencana Rayatama's acquisition of 20.16 million shares of PT Akr Corporindo TBK. The transactions resulted in changes to shareholdings, with some investors increasing their stakes and others decreasing theirs, affecting companies in various industries such as food, energy, and finance.
title: Multiple major shareholders and investors make significant changes to their stakes in various Indonesian companies across different industries.

body: PT Puri Karya Bersama, a subsidiary of PT Puri Global Sukses Tbk, has secured a IDR 200 billion syndicated revolving loan from 13 rural credit banks, equivalent to 166.15% of its total equity as of June 2024. The loan facility, available until August 30, 2025, will be used to expedite the Monde City project and is expected to support the company's growth, with total assets recorded at IDR 398.56 billion and revenue at IDR 7.73 billion as of June 2024.
title: PT Puri Karya Bersama secures IDR 200 billion syndicated loan from 13 rural credit banks to expedite Monde City project.

body: The Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) weakened towards the closing bell, falling from 7,794.83 to 7,756.20, with other indices such as LQ45, IDX30, and IDXESGL also declining. Meanwhile, IDX80 and IDXG30 rose, and certain shares like PT Barito Pacific TBK and PT Bank Central Asia TBK strengthened, while others like PT Chandra Asri Pacific TBK and PT Adaro Energy Indonesia TBK corrected.
title: Jakarta Composite Index Weakens After Initial Gains

body: The Indonesian Ministry of Finance has received a proposal to increase the excise rate on packaged sugary drinks to 2.5%, aiming to reduce the negative impact of sugary drinks and increase state revenues. The proposal, which is expected to be implemented by the next government, recommends a gradual increase in the excise rate to 20% by 2025, reducing dependence on tobacco product excise taxes.
title: Ministry of Finance Receives Proposal to Implement 2.5% Excise Rate on Packaged Sugary Drinks

body: PT Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper Tbk plans to issue bonds and sukuk worth IDR 3.5 trillion (approximately USD 230 million) in three series with tenors ranging from 370 days to 5 years, with proceeds allocated towards debt refinancing, factory construction, and asset acquisition. The company will use approximately 60% of the bond issuance proceeds to refinance its debts, while 75% of the USD bond proceeds will be used to acquire assets, and the sukuk mudharabah proceeds will be channelled towards working capital.
title: Indah Kiat Pulp & Paper to Issue Bonds and Sukuk Worth IDR 3.5 Trillion and USD 20 Million

body: PT XL Axiata Tbk will lease hybrid fiber coaxial fiber from PT Link Net Tbk for IDR 11.06 trillion and acquire its Serveco business line for IDR 1.87 trillion, totaling IDR 12.94 trillion. This transaction, valued at 48.11% of PT XL Axiata's total equity, has been approved by the board of directors and commissioners, and is expected to strengthen the company's position in the industry.
title: PT XL Axiata to lease hybrid fiber coaxial fiber and acquire Serveco business line from PT Link Net for IDR 12.94 trillion.

body: PT Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper Industry, a subsidiary of Sinarmas Group, plans to issue IDR 2.5 trillion in shelf registration bonds and sukuk, with each series having a principal amount of IDR 1.25 trillion, to be listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange on October 4, 2024. The proceeds, approximately 80%, will be used to pay principal and interest debt, while the remainder will be allocated for the company's working capital.
title: Lontar Papyrus Pulp & Paper to Issue IDR 2.5 Trillion Bonds and Sukuk in September 2024
